pi_items.source: Verified by extracting and analyzing the farmOS Field Kit v0.8.0 source code (App.vue), which confirms the presence and exact wording of the 'Share My Location' toggle in the navigation drawer.
Verified against the explicit task description which instructs the user to 'turn 'Share My Location' OFF (disabled)'.

privileged_info_summary: The exact setting 'Share My Location' exists in the farmOS Field Kit (v0.8.0) navigation drawer (App.vue) and is confirmed to be enabled ('ON') by default via the 'useGeolocation' property in the app's shell state. The expected end state of 'off' directly reflects the explicit task instructions.
